arts.ttl: Karl Darlow selection is not the only big Leeds call Farke must make vs Luton
arts.sum: The big talking point has been on the goalkeeper situation and Illan Meslier - and Daniel Farke has already revealed his selection decision for the weekend. United have won just once in their last five games, which denotes their poorest form this season and at the worst time too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Luton Town with Daniel Farke set to shuffle the pack
arts.sum: Farke revealed at his pre-match press conference that Karl Darlow will replace Illan Meslier in goal for the trip to Kenilworth Road. Sometimes you have to protect a goalkeeper a little bit and this was my feeling this week.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Luton Town vs. Leeds United

arts.sum: Town supporters urged to ‘bring the noise’ by appreciative manager

arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United could be a key figure for the Hatters

arts.sum: Leeds United are in the thick of a promotion clash alongside Sheffield United and Burnley heading into April’s fixtures. Burnley midfielder talks promotion run-in amid Leeds United and Sheffield United pressure

arts.sum: Town chief unfazed by Farke’s decision to bring in Karl Darlow

arts.ttl: Premier League club 'serious' over Hugo Bueno as Leeds United handed major transfer update
arts.sum: Leeds United are facing serious competition from a Premier League club for the proposed signing of Wolves left-back Hugo Bueno this summer. That said, the West Yorkshire side face some tough competition from Nottingham Forest, who are also hoping to bolster their squad in anticipation of playing in the Champions League next season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United notebook - Harry Gray success as under-fire Illan Meslier branded promotion risk - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Keeping on the topic of the U21s, the youth team have managed to reach the final of the National League Cup. The competition was revived after a 20-year absence for this season under a new name and slightly different rules. That said, the manager is being cautious not to talk too much about a 16-year-old who has yet to make his senior debut and has underlined how he is not likely to start a first-team game in the near future.

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s Most Expensive Transfers: Hits & Misses
arts.sum: Leeds broke their transfer record to bring in Rutter for a £36million package during a desperate January window in 2023, needing big signings in defence, midfield, and attack to boost their chances of survival, but the young Frenchman struggled to settle in immediately. With the club spiralling toward relegation, expectations were sky-high and unfair on a young player who ultimately didn’t decide his own transfer fee, and also wasn’t able to showcase any potential of being worth that sum, deemed not ready by both Javi Gracia and Sam Allardyce – two unsuccessful bosses in the Elland Road dugout.
